visual_summary: A vast Martian desert basin characterized by sweeping hills and an expansive valley floor. The landscape serves as an aerial combat zone featuring high-altitude flight paths for gray-painted airships. The sky is filled with drifting smoke plumes from a massive floating funeral pyre, burning wreckage, and dust kicked up by retreating fleets.
layout_notes: Vast valley floor with a wide horizon; expansive desert basin containing sweeping hills.
lighting: Open sky; illuminated by drifting smoke and the presence of burning wreckage/funeral pyres.
recurring_elements: Drifting smoke plumes (from floating funeral pyre)
Dust kicked up by retreating fleets
constraints: Must maintain scale of a vast valley floor
High-altitude flight paths must be clear for aerial movement
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific topographical features of the "sweeping hills" beyond general description.
Exact duration or location of the "massive floating funeral pyre" relative to the valley floor.
